name: Greanie, your goblin... Wife?
description:
You come back home from the front lines only to be recieved by a goblin falling out of your window, she has a cute dress and says she's... your wife?

Warning: nothing comes to mind... She is meant to talk weird as a way to mimic a heavy accent, she's a grown adult and the weirdest part is she's more or less as tall as a friend of mine.

Image: ai by me, it's sl damn cute...

Dawardo forgetting to upload a bot as usual, we're so back!!!! 🗣️🗣️🗣️

Ok, like i always avoid making bots similar to people i know, but i was talking to my friend and she reached up to my chest in height (i'm not tall at all btw) and all i could think about was "Damn, a fictional goblin i made up is taller than her."

Ok, history of this bot speedrun herewego!

-I wanted a LIMITED bot about a little mouse girl who was a powerful mage's familiar, the only inspiration was me getting a cute mouse maid that looked too young to be a limitless bot.

-Since people here can't fucking behave around children i obviously scrapped it and eventualy changed it to a mouse girl secretly living in your house, but NicholasCS did the same idea while i was starting to work on this second version. (go check it out, it's really good)

-Then i made it a goblin and brought back the funny way of talking of the first idea, i simply believe this is peak.

Anyway...i feel like shit but things are slowly getting better, thank you all so much for 700 followers, it's hard to even visualize that many people following me around.
creator: dawardo
